channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — June 15, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst. This is your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest global developments, European affairs, and regional news from Central Europe. Today is Monday, June 15, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — June 14, 2026
item.description: Good morning. This is The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events and European developments, presented by your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot. Today is Sunday, June 14, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — June 13, 2026
item.description: Good morning. Tensions continue to simmer across the Middle East despite signs of a potential US-Iran peace deal, while Ukraine presses allies for more aid amidst escalating drone warfare, including the controversial use of autonomous systems. In Eur...
